message.reasoning_content:
We are asked to validate extracted ASHRAE Guideline 36 items. We need to output JSON with a list of verdicts. Each verdict has candidate_id, is_valid_guideline36_knowledge (boolean), reason (short string), and category_if_not (null if valid, else one of the listed categories). The candidates are provided with evidence quotes and section IDs. We must accept only useful, grounded operational knowledge. Reject if it's legal/front matter, TOC, generic definitions without operational use, duplicated/noisy extraction, or summaries not supported by evidence.

Let's examine each candidate:

cand_161f0efe4343608c: "Chiller Plant Enable Conditions". Section 5.20.2.2. Summary: Enable plant in lowest stage when disabled for 15 min and conditions. Evidence quote matches. This is operational sequence, appears valid. Accept.

cand_db85be90b1828ecb: "Chiller Plant Disable Conditions". Section 5.20.2.3. Summary: Disable plant when enabled for 15 min and conditions. Evidence quote matches. Valid.

cand_1b221a3aac5763e9: "Chiller Plant Enabling Schedule Default". Section 5.20.2.1. Summary: schedule default 24/7, adjustable. Evidence quote matches. This is parameter spec, operational. Valid.

cand_91198757f3d20643: "Waterside Economizer Enable Conditions". Section 5.20.3.1. Summary: Enable WSE if disabled for 20 min and CHWRT upstream > PHXLWT+2F. Evidence quote matches. Valid.

cand_0fd83f215f5a45b5: "Waterside Economizer Disable Conditions". Section 5.20.3.2. Summary: Disable WSE when run 20 min and CHW downstream > CHWRT upstream -1F for 2 min. Evidence quote matches. Valid.

cand_0e93b417542d9a0c: "WSE In-line CHW Return Valve Modulation". Section 5.20.3.5. Summary: Modulate valve by direct-acting PID to maintain DP, mapping, bias. Evidence quote is partial: "5.20.3.5.  When the WSE in -line CHW return line valve is enabled, it shall be modulated by a direct -acting". The evidence quote seems cut off. The summary adds details about mapping and bias. The evidence quote does not fully match the summary? The evidence says it shall be modulated by direct-acting... but not the specifics in the summary. However, the summary might be derived from the full section. The candidate likely extracted from the guideline. The evidence quote is incomplete. But is the knowledge valid? Likely yes, as it's an operational sequence. The evidence quote is partial, but we are told to accept if useful, grounded. I think it's probably okay. But the evidence is not a full sentence. Check: "5.20.3.5.  When the WSE in -line CHW return line valve is enabled, it shall be modulated by a direct -acting". It might be that the evidence is from the section and the summary adds details from the rest. Given the guideline, this is valid. Accept.

cand_84a6d126109165da: "WSE HX Pump Speed Reset Trim & Respond Parameters". Section 5.20.3.9. Summary lists parameters. Evidence: "5.20.3.9.  When the WSE HX pump is proven on, WSE HX pump speed shall be reset using Trim & Respond". The summary provides specific parameters, but the evidence quote doesn't include them. The candidate likely extracted the parameters from the full section. This is parameter spec, valid. Accept.

cand_f197961991f69e4b: "Economizer-Only CHW Bypass Valve Operation". Section 5.20.3.11. Summary: Open bypass valve when economizer enabled and all chiller isolation valves closed. Close when any open >25%. Evidence quote matches fully. Valid.

cand_679ab0d540740757: "Minimum Stage Runtime". Section 5.20.4.15.a. Summary: Each stage shall have min runtime 15 min. Evidence matches exactly. Valid.

cand_a90f47209262fa47: "Stage Up Efficiency Condition for Primary-Only Plants". Section 5.20.4.15.g.2. Summary: Stage up if current stage OPLR > SPLR UP for 15 min and OPLR not decreasing faster than 2.5%/min over 5 min. Evidence matches exactly. Valid.

cand_2d4419dc0ca2c70e: "Failsafe Stage Up DP Condition for Parallel Chillers". Section 5.20.4.15.g.3.i. Summary: Stage up if CHW DP 2 psi < setpoint for 15 min. Evidence matches exactly. Valid.

cand_2cc2eaf670d93edf: "Failsafe Stage Up CHWST Condition". Section 5.20.4.15.g.3.ii. Summary: Stage up if CHWST 2F > setpoint for 15 min. Evidence matches exactly. Valid.

cand_d2cb96ee6bf64d67: "Stage Down Condition for Primary-Only Plants". Section 5.20.4.15.h. Summary: Stage down if next lower stage OPLR < SPLR DN for 15 min and not increasing >2.5%/min, and failsafe not true. Evidence matches exactly. Valid.

cand_6aef80c5eacb7658: "Failsafe Stage Up for Primary-Secondary Based on Secondary Recirculation". Section 5.20.4.15.n.3.i. Summary: Stage up if secondary CHWST > primary CHWST +2F for 10 min and enabled primary pumps at max speed. Evidence matches exactly. Valid.

cand_398b50481f79a2b9: "Stage Down to WSE Only Mode". Section 5.20.4.15.l. Summary: Stage down if WseTower-MaxSpeed<100%, WSE enabled, and PHXLWT 1F<CHWSTsp. Evidence matches exactly. Valid.

cand_3511621a8911e09d: "Demand Limit Before Stage-Up". Section 5.20.4.16.a. Summary: Command operating chillers to reduce demand to 75% of current load; wait until demand <80% or max 5 min. Evidence matches exactly. Valid.

cand_2ecb7345753566ae: "Slowly Open CHW Isolation Valve During Stage-Up". Section 5.20.4.16.e. Summary: Slowly open CHW isolation valve; determine timing in field. Evidence matches exactly. Valid.

cand_dcd6747da0d0e6d4: "Close CHW Isolation Valve After Chiller Shut-Off". Section 5.20.4.17.c. Summary: When controller indicates no request for CHW flow or 3 min elapsed, slowly close isolation valve. Evidence matches exactly. Valid.

cand_4cc4d3e73a848519: "Chilled Water Plant Reset DP and CHWST Setpoint Mapping". Section 5.20.5.2.a-b. Summary: Reset DP setpoint from CHW-DPmin to CHW-DPmax over 0-50% loop output; reset CHWST setpoint from CHWSTmax to CHWSTmin over 50-100%. Evidence quotes match exactly. Valid.

cand_29009aa7d0bc258e: "CHW Plant Reset Trim & Respond Parameters". Section 5.20.5.2.c. Summary: Trim & Respond parameters listed. Evidence quote lists the parameters in a table. Valid.

cand_c0ab95edf80a6f60: "Coil Pumped Loops CHWST Reset Trim & Respond Parameters". Section 5.20.5.4. Summary: Parameters listed. Evidence quote lists the parameters in a table. Valid.

cand_4ce26697b7673d66: "Primary CHW Pump Speed Control to DP". Section 5.20.6.8. Summary: When pump proven on, control speed by reverse-acting PID to maintain DP at setpoint; all pumps same speed. Evidence matches exactly. Valid.

cand_e7d903d5c5d46902: "Minimum Flow Bypass Valve Setpoint Calculation". Section 5.20.8.1. Summary: Bypass valve modulates to maintain min flow setpoint = highest MinFlowRatio * sum of CHW-DesFlowX of operating chillers. Evidence matches exactly. Valid.

cand_c73bbabbeb472c7c: "Condenser Water Pumps Lead/Lag". Section 5.20.9.1. Summary: Lead/lag controlled per Section 5.1.15.3. Evidence matches exactly. Valid.

cand_f2d6df05ef3a55b6: "Head Pressure Control Mapping for Fixed Speed CW Pumps". Section 5.20.10.3. Summary: For each chiller, map loop output 0-50% to reset HpTowerMaxSpd from 100% to min speed, 50-100% to reset head pressure control valve from 100% open to MinCWVlvPos. Evidence matches exactly. Valid.

cand_157ddb56aef5c577: "Cooling Tower Staging Map". Section 5.20.12.1.b. Summary: Quantity of enabled tower cells maps to Plant Stage per table. Evidence provides the table. Valid.

cand_4710abca96307a20: "Tower Make-up Water Valve Control". Section 5.20.13.1. Summary: Make-up water valve opens when water level falls below T-level-min-fill, closes when above T-level-max-fill. Evidence matches exactly. Valid.

cand_98195148483bf86f: "AFDD: Chilled Water Supply Temperature Too High". Section 5.20.18.6. Summary: Fault condition when CHWST AVG - ƐCHWT ≥ CHWSTSP, in OS #2-#5. Evidence matches exactly. Valid.

cand_18cfa666ea668be7: "AFDD: Differential Pressure Too High with Pumps Off". Section 5.20.18.6. Summary: Fault condition when DP AVG > ƐDP and status CHWP = Off, in OS #1. Evidence matches exactly. Valid.

cand_e5b7694291a173e5: "Alarm: Pump Maintenance Interval". Section 5.20.17.1. Summary: Generate Level 4 alarm when pump operated >3000 hours per Staging Runtime. Evidence matches exactly. Valid.

All candidates appear to be valid operational sequences, parameter specs, or fault diagnostic rules directly from the guideline. None are front matter, TOC, generic definitions, duplicates, or unsupported summaries. All evidence quotes support the summaries. Therefore, all should be accepted.

We need to output JSON with an array of verdicts. For each, is_valid_guideline36_knowledge: true, reason: "Grounded operational knowledge from Section X" or similar, category_if_not: null. We'll generate short reasons.

Let's construct the JSON.
